guardrails: This bundle prepares local UI evidence only; it does not claim A4 acceptance.
Every review item remains pending_a4_review until an A4 reviewer records end-to-end UX acceptance evidence.
The bundle is limited to TRACK-LOCAL-UI-EVIDENCE from W1.5.174.
FR-001 packaging and cross-platform launch evidence stays outside this bundle until packaging dependency gates are approved.
No production runtime, renderer behavior, dependency, spec, ADR, generated schema, packaging, updater, or baseline docx change is included in W1.5.176.
Visual-smoke evidence must remain sanitized and must not include raw prompts, raw model output, query/hash secrets, or output directory values.

review_items.review_focus: Desktop shell window and first viewport workbench surface
source_checklist_remaining_gap: Desktop menu bar acceptance is not recorded.
Cross-platform packaged launch evidence is blocked by packaging dependency gates.
required_react_test_markers: renderer runtime workbench React shell renders server snapshot without DOM binding
missing_before_acceptance: A4 has not recorded menu bar acceptance.
Cross-platform packaged launch evidence is still blocked by packaging dependency gates.

review_items.review_focus: Left Dock first-level module coverage and panel switching evidence
source_checklist_remaining_gap: Complete first-level module coverage has not been accepted by A4.
Dock collapse behavior is not recorded as a formal FR acceptance item.
missing_before_acceptance: All first-level module entries have not been accepted.
Dock collapse and restore have not been recorded as an A4 path.

review_items.review_focus: File Tree scaffold selection and detail evidence
source_checklist_remaining_gap: Real filesystem enumeration and project-backed file open actions are not implemented.
Default-hidden Drawer behavior has not been accepted as an A4 UX path.
required_react_test_markers: renderer runtime workbench React shell selects file tree node locally
missing_before_acceptance: Project-backed filesystem enumeration is not implemented.
Default-hidden Drawer interaction has not been accepted by A4.

review_items.review_focus: Local Canvas node selection and inspector binding evidence
source_checklist_remaining_gap: Selection is still local scaffold behavior rather than accepted React Flow behavior.
Automatic right-side Task binding has not been accepted end to end.
required_react_test_markers: renderer runtime workbench React shell selects focused canvas node locally
missing_before_acceptance: Selection is still local scaffold behavior.
Right Task details have not been accepted as automatically bound to the selected node.

review_items.review_focus: Task Drawer local selection and collapsed/expanded detail evidence
source_checklist_remaining_gap: Full field coverage for inputs, outputs, review rules, Skill, model, and artifacts is not accepted.
Runtime-backed detail updates are not implemented.
required_react_test_markers: renderer runtime workbench React shell toggles task drawer collapse
renderer runtime workbench React shell selects task drawer item locally
missing_before_acceptance: Inputs, outputs, review rules, Skill, model, and artifact fields are not fully accepted.
Runtime-backed detail updates are not implemented.

review_items.review_focus: Shortcut routing, keyboard selection, and command-map evidence
source_checklist_remaining_gap: A formal common-shortcut acceptance list is not recorded.
User-facing command discoverability is not implemented.
required_react_test_markers: renderer runtime workbench React shell keyboard binding helper owns target lifecycle
renderer runtime workbench React shell maps actions to commands
renderer runtime workbench React shell submits chat draft with keyboard shortcut
missing_before_acceptance: A formal common-shortcut acceptance list is not recorded.
User-facing command discoverability is not implemented.
